nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God of hosts, “Come, go to this steward, To Shebna, who is in charge of the royal household,

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God of hosts, “Come, go to this steward, to Shebna, who is over the household, and say to him:

cnv.text: 主萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “你去見這掌管庫房的， 就是總管舍伯那，對他說：

ccb.text: 主——万军之耶和华吩咐我去见宫廷总管舍伯那，对他说：

csbs.text: 主万军之耶和华如此说：“去吧，到管理宫殿的舍伯纳总管那里，对他说：
